top_videos.title: This New Feature Is A Big Deal For Creatives
top_videos.description:
This new AI feature from Canva is actually amazing for creatives.

They just launched Magic Layers — and it can take ANY image and automatically break it into editable layers.

So if you have a real or AI generated image, Canva can separate things like the background, objects, people, or individual elements.

Then you can rearrange, resize, or completely recompose the image like it was originally built in layers.

That means you can generate one AI image and then turn it into multiple thumbnails, ads, or designs without starting over.

Honestly, if you make YouTube thumbnails, ads, or social content, this is a feature you’ll want to know about.

#ai #canva #aitools #contentcreation #ainews

top_videos.title: I Created 32 Social Media Posts in 10 Minutes Using Claude + Canva
top_videos.description:
*Download the free On-Brand Social Media Design Kit — includes ready-to-use templates, a 30-question brand audit, and a platform specs guide to help you run this system from day one:* 🔗 https://clickhubspot.com/d416ed

Stop rebuilding layouts from scratch. Stop re-deciding fonts every week. This tutorial shows you exactly how to connect Claude AI with Canva to create on-brand social media content at scale — without benching your creativity.

In this video, you'll learn how to set up a repeatable design system using Claude as your creative strategist and Canva as your graphic designer, so you can go from brief to publish faster than ever.

What we cover:
How to build a Canva Brand Kit that keeps your content consistent by default
How to connect Claude to your Canva workspace (takes under 2 minutes)
How to train Claude on your brand guidelines so every output feels on-brand
A step-by-step workflow for generating social media designs using AI
A live 10-minute game day challenge: 32 on-brand assets, one brand, one system

Whether you're a solo marketer, a small business owner, or managing content for multiple clients, this workflow is designed to eliminate design friction and scale what's already working.

Timestamps:
0:00 – The Big Misconception About AI and Creativity

insights_en:
Top Channel Themes This Week
- AI automation channels continue to dominate discovery and engagement.
- Marketing channels with practical frameworks outperform generic commentary.
- Arabic-language or Gulf-context framing improves regional relevance.

Top Opportunities
- Publish Saudi-focused AI automation breakdowns with clear business outcomes.
- Use weekly format roundups (tools, workflows, case examples).
- Prioritize short explainers + one deep strategic video each week.
insights_ar:
أهم توجهات القنوات هذا الأسبوع
- قنوات أتمتة الذكاء الاصطناعي تتصدر الاكتشاف والتفاعل.
- قنوات التسويق العملية التي تقدم أطر واضحة تتفوق على المحتوى العام.
- الصياغة العربية أو الخليجية ترفع ملاءمة المحتوى إقليمياً.

أفضل الفرص
- نشر تحليلات أتمتة موجهة للسوق السعودي بنتائج أعمال واضحة.
- تقديم ملخص أسبوعي للصيغ الناجحة: أدوات، سير عمل، حالات تطبيق.
- المزج بين مقاطع قصيرة تفسيرية ومقطع استراتيجي عميق أسبوعياً.
